LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TAUSHA BOGARD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AT LEAST AS TO THE REASONABLE RENTAL VALUE, GIVEN DEFENDANT'S EVIDENCE OF HABITABILITY DEFECTS. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
